newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Impinj's last events were Q1 2026 results and a strong Q2 (June-quarter) guide ($103-106M) issued in late April, plus the ongoing Gen2X protocol ramp. No new earnings, contract, or guidance change in the last two weeks; the prior export-control concern is not a new development.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO/alpha lens: prior case flagged PI for removal given weak direct CPO/HBM/advanced-packaging relevance - it is RAIN RFID/IoT-edge, off-theme. No new fundamental news since June 9, so hold the low rank; Q2 guide was an April datapoint already digested.
verdicts.bull: Record endpoint-IC bookings and Gen2X ramp support an H2 profit inflection; -29% YTD lowers the bar.
verdicts.neutral: No fresh catalyst; off-theme for the co-packaged-optics bottleneck screen.
verdicts.bear: Not a CPO/HBM/packaging bottleneck name; retail/logistics RFID adoption and demand visibility remain weak.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Gen2X ramp and endpoint-IC booking strength
verdicts.primaryRisk: Off-theme vs CPO lens; soft RFID/retail demand
